enter_end.title: Enter the End through the activated portal

dragon_observe.title: Locate and observe the Ender Dragon — identify crystal positions before engaging

subtitle.text: The End is not an ending. It is a starting point that was placed here to test you.

description: The central island is 64 blocks wide.
The obsidian pillars are spaced around the perimeter.
End Crystals sit atop most pillars — some have iron cages.
The dragon heals at crystals. Destroy them first.
The Ender Dragon is guarded by a boss lock.
Check your scroll progression before engaging.
The eye_hunt scroll unlocks the boss fight — verify it is researched.
Count the crystals. Note the cages. Plan the approach.
This is not a dungeon boss. This is the first true sequence-break fight.
The void is not a floor. Do not fall.
→ Observe the dragon and identify crystal positions [check]
